description: A URL path / route entry — the addressable unit of site navigation. A Path binds a URL pattern to a Page, and captures metadata for navigation (label, section, parent, order, visibility).

path.description: URL path pattern. Use :name for dynamic segments (e.g., /members/:slug).

label.description: Human-readable name for menus and breadcrumbs.

page.description: Path to the Page UDT instance JSON that handles this route.

section.description: Navigation section: about | resources | community | recognition | meta

parent.description: Parent Path ID — supports breadcrumb hierarchy.

order.description: Sort order within its section. Lower = earlier.

methods.description: Supported HTTP methods. Static site = GET only.

redirect_to.description: Target path if this is a redirect.

dependencies.description: Path IDs or data-source keys this path needs before it can render (autopath resolver consumes this).

provides.description: Names of resources this path makes available to dependents.

full_url.description: Full URL resolved against site base.

dependents.description: Path IDs that depend on this one (computed; inverse of dependencies).

breadcrumb.description: Ordered path IDs from root to this node.

view_id.description: Resolved View ID from the referenced Page.

last_verified.description: UTC ISO timestamp when route was last verified to resolve.
